description: Children's colored plain tights are perfect for most school uniforms and here we have the option to purchase 2 pairs at a fantastic price! We have a range of colours available to suit most uniform colours available in ages ranging from 3 up to 16 years old. These tights are made from a cotton blend material making them super soft and warm, ideal for trips to school in the cold winter weather. Crafted from premium COMBED COTTON and Lycra blend, soft leg and lovely. They are not see through or too thick for leg. They are warm but not bulky. In Spring and Summer, it is beautiful and protectable to wear the girls cotton tights with skirts. In Win-ter it can be worn under the pants for warmness. The full footed girls’ tights are perfect for wearing to parties, events, holidays, church, dancing and more. It's also an excel-lent gift choice for children's birthdays, parties or festivals. Soft combed cotton is used to make the environmental colouring for the Girls Tights. Both cotton and Nylon are quite durable and elastic. Your baby's skin won't become inflamed by our girls' tights. I advise cold hand washing and hanging drying. however, they can just as easily be used for everyday wear when they’re out playing with friends! For more back to school items including socks and underwear, please check our store.
